title: Using cleartext protocols is a security sensitive issue
description: Cleartext protocols should not be used for sensitive data transfer. They are vulnerable to eavesdropping, tampering, and interception.
message: Using cleartext protocols is a security sensitive issue
recommendation: Use secure protocols like HTTPS or SSH

noncompliant.description: Making a request to an HTTP server

compliant.description: Making a request to an HTTPS server

why_is_this_an_issue: Cleartext protocols are insecure due to potential eavesdropping, tampering, and interception.
how_to_fix: Use secure protocols like HTTPS or SSH

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the URL is a cleartext protocol

metadata.title: Using cleartext protocols is a security sensitive issue
